"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\raylib-first.dir/objects.a
D:\WorkSpace\games101\libraray\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\raylib-first.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\raylib-first.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\WorkSpace\games101\libraray\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\raylib-first.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o raylib-first.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libraylib-first.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\raylib-first.dir\linkLibs.rsp
